info.name: Telco CRM — Via Gateway
info.description:
All Telco CRM APIs routed through the API Gateway at {{gateway_url}}.
Two top-level folders: 'By Service' (one folder per microservice) and 'Journeys' (end-to-end chained flows).

Pre-requisite: run postman/scripts/setup-hosts.sh (macOS) or setup-hosts.ps1 (Windows) once, then select the 'Local - Gateway' environment.

exec: // Auto-refresh Keycloak token when missing or within 30 s of expiry.

item.name: _Auth
item.description: Explicit token management. The collection pre-request script handles auto-refresh; use these only for manual inspection or troubleshooting.

item.name: By Service
item.description: All endpoints grouped by microservice. The gateway routes each path to the correct downstream service.

item.name: Journeys
item.description: End-to-end business flows. Each folder's requests are ordered to be run top-to-bottom. Test scripts chain IDs (customer_id → order_id → subscription_id etc.) automatically.

item.name: 1. Customer Onboarding
item.description:
Register → KYC approve → list tariffs → place order → pay → verify subscription activated.
Run requests in order. The collection token auto-refresh handles auth.

item.name: 2. Invoice & Payment
item.description: Admin triggers bill-run → customer lists invoices → views invoice → pays → downloads PDF.

item.name: 3. Usage Monitoring
item.description: Check real-time quota then fetch CDR history with cursor pagination.

item.name: 3.3 Get Usage History (next page via cursor)
4. Support Ticket Flow
item.description: Customer opens ticket → agent adds comment → assigns → resolves.
